description: Align Rust CLI command names, subcommand structure, and aliases with the Go CLI so existing scripts, CI pipelines, and documentation work unmodified. Restructure gen-deploy as gen deploy, rename completions to completion, make config default to show, and add hidden backward-compat aliases.

userStories.title: Restructure gen-deploy as gen deploy Nested Subcommand
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want to use `treb gen deploy` and `treb generate deploy` so that scripts targeting the Go CLI work with the Rust CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: `treb gen deploy Counter` produces the same output as current `treb gen-deploy Counter`
`treb generate deploy Counter` works identically (visible alias on gen parent)
`treb gen-deploy Counter` still works via hidden backward-compat alias
`treb gen deploy Counter --json` produces valid JSON output
`treb gen deploy Counter --strategy create2` works with all existing flags
`Commands::json_flag()` returns true for `Gen { Deploy { json: true } }`
Help grouping shows `gen` (not `gen-deploy`) under Main Commands
`cargo check -p treb-cli` passes with no errors

userStories.title: Update gen-deploy Golden Tests and Test File for New Syntax
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden tests and test files updated to use `gen deploy` syntax so that the test suite passes after the command restructure.
acceptanceCriteria: All `commands.golden` files under `crates/treb-cli/tests/golden/gen_deploy_*` use `gen deploy` syntax
All test invocations in `crates/treb-cli/tests/cli_gen_deploy.rs` use `["gen", "deploy", ...]` args
`cargo test -p treb-cli` passes — all gen-deploy golden tests pass
Golden `.expected` files are updated via `UPDATE_GOLDEN=1` to reflect any help text changes
`cargo check -p treb-cli` passes

userStories.title: Rename completions Command to completion
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want to use `treb completion` (singular) so that shell setup instructions from Go CLI documentation work with the Rust CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: `treb completion bash` generates valid bash completions
`treb completion zsh`, `treb completion fish`, `treb completion elvish` all work
`treb completions bash` still works via hidden backward-compat alias
Help text shows `completion` (not `completions`) under Additional Commands
All tests in `cli_completions.rs` pass with updated command name
`cargo check -p treb-cli` passes

userStories.title: Make config Default to show When No Subcommand Given
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want `treb config` with no subcommand to display resolved configuration so that it matches Go CLI behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: `treb config` (no args) produces the same output as `treb config show`
`treb config --json` produces the same output as `treb config show --json`
`treb config show` still works explicitly
`treb config set` and `treb config remove` still work unchanged
`Commands::json_flag()` returns true for bare `config --json`
Existing config golden tests still pass
`cargo check -p treb-cli` passes

userStories.title: Update Help Text Golden Tests for All Command Changes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want help text golden snapshots updated so they reflect the renamed and restructured commands from US-001 through US-004.
acceptanceCriteria: Help text shows `gen` (with `generate` alias noted) under Main Commands
Help text shows `completion` under Additional Commands
`config` help text reflects optional subcommand / default-to-show behavior
All golden tests pass: `cargo test -p treb-cli`
No unintended changes to non-help golden snapshots
`cargo check -p treb-cli` passes

userStories.title: Add Integration Tests for Aliases and Backward Compatibility
userStories.description: As a developer, I want explicit integration tests for every alias form and backward-compatible invocation so that future refactors cannot accidentally break them.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: `treb gen deploy Counter --json` succeeds and produces valid JSON
Test: `treb generate deploy Counter --json` succeeds with identical output to `gen deploy`
Test: `treb gen-deploy Counter --json` succeeds with identical output (backward compat)
Test: `treb completion bash` exits 0 and produces shell completion output
Test: `treb completions bash` exits 0 (backward compat)
Test: `treb config` (no subcommand) exits 0 and produces config output
All tests pass: `cargo test -p treb-cli`
`cargo check -p treb-cli` passes
